name: showbook-spotify-sdk
description: Showbook's Expo Module wrapper around the Spotify iOS SDK (SPTAppRemote v5.0.1) and Spotify Android SDK (AppRemote v0.8.0). Exposes connect/play/pause/disconnect for the in-app preview player driver chain — Premium-only for on-demand playback, Free users get the shuffle fallback the App Remote SDK itself enforces.
